creator: stievenard.david@gmail.com
text:
fresh install of freebsd 10.3

the compatibiliy test included in the glpi install process says that there is 2 missing dependencies
- php56-fileinfo
- php56-zlib


but there might be more...according to this github page -> https://github.com/remicollet/remirepo/blob/master/glpi/glpi/glpi.spec#L69
